title: rhododendron orbiculare
intro: Rhododendron orbiculare, a species of flowering plant native to the Himalayas, is a type of rhododendron that is commonly found in the eastern parts of the mountain range. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron orbiculare include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even show promise in treating certain types of cancer. The plant's roots can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
